scope: Regression testing of the Convert conversational AI careersite agent, focusing on UI functionality and previously reported bugs related to branching questions, template saving, and general chat behavior.

testCases.title: Verify Chat Widget Initialization and Basic Interaction
steps: Verify the chat widget is visible and the initial bot message is displayed.
Type a simple greeting (e.g., 'Hello') into the chat input field.
testCases.expectedResult: The chat widget initializes correctly, displays the initial bot message, and responds to the greeting with a relevant message.

testCases.title: Test Branching Question Functionality - Text Input
steps: Initiate a chat session and navigate to a branching question that requires text input.
Enter a valid category name into the text input field.
testCases.expectedResult: The bot should respond with the appropriate follow-up message without displaying any error messages. The chat flow should proceed as expected.

testCases.title: Verify Template Saving with Required Details
steps: Attempt to save the template without entering any required details.
testCases.expectedResult: The system should prevent saving the template and display appropriate error messages indicating which required fields are missing.

testCases.title: Test UI Responsiveness with Multiple Branching Questions
steps: Initiate a chat session and navigate to a scenario with at least 12 branching questions.
Attempt to scroll through the chat window.
testCases.expectedResult: The UI should remain stable and scrolling should function correctly without any visual distortions or errors. The chat window should be fully scrollable.

testCases.title: Verify Navigation to Follow-up Question in Collapsed Mode
steps: Initiate a chat session and navigate to a branching question with a follow-up question.
Select an option that triggers the follow-up question.
testCases.expectedResult: The application should navigate to the new follow-up question, and the follow-up question should be visible even though the parent branching question is collapsed.
